title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 97.
content:
There was an old Person of Chester,
    Whom several small children did pester;
    They threw some large stones,
    Which broke most of his bones,
    And displeased that old person of Chester.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 97." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
